narrative.narrative: Fear has a death grip on the market, with the Fear & Greed Index plunging to 28 as BTC's 30-day momentum crumbles, yet a weakening DXY under a RISK_ON regime is quietly building a pressure cooker. This is the same emotional and structural fingerprint as the August 2024 bottom, where panic exhausted itself just before a violent snap-back. The crowd is bracing for a breakdown, but the floor feels borrowed from a past where sellers ran out of ammo.
narrative.headline: Panic Mirrors August Bottom as Dollar Fades

next_move.outlook: The narrative arc suggests this panic is a final purge within a broader risk-on structure, setting the stage for a sharp mean-reversion rally once the last weak hands are shaken out.
